current.text_map_html_contact_us: cnr Galway and Kilkenny Rd, Hennopspark, Centurion, 0157
current.text_info_contact_us:
ONE LIFE offers a holistic approach to health and wellness. Our mission is to provide the highest quality innovative, natural, organic, eco-friendly health products to consumers at competitive prices.
Our store features a wide variety of natural and organic products, including health supplements, skin & beauty, household & pantry items and sports nutrition.
Our friendly & knowledgeable team at ONE LIFE aim to provide you with cost-effective health solutions, tailored to reach your health goals.

settings.banner_content:
1. Add items to your cart

Browse 1000's of products across our multiple categories and add them to your cart.

2. Securely Checkout

Once you have confirmed your cart contents proceed to checkout and make payment safely and securely via PayFast..

3. Receive your items

Once payment is confirmed, you will receive your order within a few days.

settings.greeting_message:
👋 Hi, message us with any questions. We're happy to help!
Please note: Messages sent here will be answered by a One Life staff member during working hours. (For immediate replies chat to our One Life Chat AI Assistant. Please see chat icon on the bottom right corner of our website!)
